task_description: Apply visual enhancements to the Shogun's Ascent game UI: larger Shinto icons, white borders on diorama buttons and force name badges, province-colored region names with white outline, gold bold war token text, 5-per-line icon limit in region cards, top-anchored card growth, parchment card backgrounds, gold-bordered harvest hexagons, thicker harvest connecting lines, thicker sea routes with white border.

verification.summary: Build passes (exit code 0). Pre-existing TS errors in BattleBiddingOverlay.tsx and BattlePanel.tsx are unrelated to changes. No test suite exists in this project.
